commit.message:
feat: multi-document compliance policy builder with Sonnet 4.6 + Excel support

- Compliance ingest: upgraded to Sonnet 4.6 for comprehensive requirement
  extraction from reference docs. Enhanced prompt with compliance analyst
  persona, domain-specific categories, and 120K char context limit.
- Multi-document: handler accepts sourceDocumentKeys array, processes each
  document, appends requirements to baseline (preserves existing), runs
  LLM-powered deduplication across documents to merge overlapping reqs.
- Excel support: added openpyxl to compliance-parsers layer, new parse_xlsx
  parser reads all sheets with structured text output.
- Source tracking: each requirement now includes sourceDocument field for
  traceability back to the reference document it came from.
- API: generate-requirements endpoint accepts documentKeys array alongside
  legacy documentKey for backward compatibility.
- Frontend: BaselineEditor supports multi-file selection (PDF, DOCX, PPTX,
  XLSX), shows upload progress per file, displays document count in status.

commit.message:
Auto-login static site from desktop agent's configured username

When the static site loads and finds no localStorage session, it now checks
the desktop agent's /api/config for a stored hiveUsername. If found, it
auto-creates a local session — the user sees "Logged In" immediately without
needing to re-authenticate with Keychain.

Flow: desktop agent has username → static site detects agent → reads config →
auto-login → both are in sync.

directly via PyObjC ensures correct Unicode handling.

commit.message:
Fix coach drawer closing on every message send

Root cause: handleSend() called refreshSession() which fired TOKEN_REFRESHED.
AuthContext.onAuthStateChange updated the user reference on every token refresh,
which triggered useProfile re-fetch in OnboardingGate. The brief isLoading=true
state caused OnboardingGate to show a spinner, unmounting AppLayout entirely.
When it remounted, isCoachOpen reset to false — closing the drawer and losing
the streaming response.

Two fixes:
1. AuthContext: skip setUser on TOKEN_REFRESHED (user didn't change, only token)
2. getAccessToken: use getSession() first (no side-effects), only refreshSession
   as fallback when no session exists

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Merge code-review: security fixes, race conditions, UX/UI improvements

- Security: OmniAuth POST-only, CSP nonce via SecureRandom, XSS fix in notifications
- Race conditions: pessimistic locking in offer acceptance
- Performance: N+1 fixes, subquery instead of pluck
- UX/UI: new request form redesign, profile page improvements, a11y fixes
- Password match validation, char counters, smart back navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: normalize timestamp format to Z suffix for consistent data hashes

Replace to_rfc3339() with to_rfc3339_opts(SecondsFormat::Secs, true) in
data-affecting code paths. to_rfc3339() produces "+00:00" suffix while
the JSONL input data uses "Z" suffix — this inconsistency causes
identical data to produce different hashes, breaking cache invalidation.

Fixed locations:
- robot.rs: compute_data_hash() — CRITICAL, affects cache invalidation
- export_sqlite.rs: issue timestamps, dependency created_at, comment created_at
- main.rs: history event compat timestamp serialization
- tui.rs: timestamp search and history event display

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: disable phantom reconciliation and fix RECON_MISSING position_ids (#1233)

Phantom reconciliation creates synthetic close entries that double-count
positions already covered by RECONCILIATION_MISSING from Flex Query.
Data analysis shows phantoms add 2 extra non-zero symbols to the
state sync discrepancy (7 vs 5 without them, vs IB's 2).

Changes:
- Disable _reconcile_phantom_ledger_entries() in run_position_audit_cycle
- Filter PHANTOM entries in _reconcile_state_stores (matches
  get_local_active_positions filtering already in place)
- New _resolve_original_position_ids() looks up real position_ids from
  the consolidated ledger instead of using fabricated Flex Query IDs
- Pass already-loaded ledger to avoid redundant disk reads
- Pre-compute symbol→pid lookup dict instead of per-row sort
- Add cleanup script for historical phantom entries in archives

Co-authored-by: Claude Code Bot <claude-code@coffee-bot.dev>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

✨ Add Temporal-native fairness to backend

Worker: maxConcurrentActivityTaskExecutions from env (2×10=20).
Workflow: dispatch all calls with FairnessKey/FairnessWeight,
no more occupancy polling gate — Temporal handles backpressure.
Activities: fetchQueuedCalls replaces fetchCallBatch+fetchOccupancy.
API: global-occupancy returns allocated_slots via largest remainder,
CRUD uses fairness_weight, simulation uses allocated slots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add NASA FIRMS fire detection + Fire & Air Quality federal lens

Integrates VIIRS NOAA-20 satellite fire detection across 5 military
command regions (CENTCOM, CONUS, INDOPACOM, EUCOM, AFRICOM) with
30 DoD installation proximity matching and burn pit history tracking.

- firmsCache module with disk/blob persistence and build lock
- Cron fetches FIRMS data every 4h, filters low-confidence, caps 2k/region
- REST API with region, point-radius, and all-regions query modes
- 3 alert patterns: fire near installation, fire+AQ convergence, burn pit zone
- FireDetectionCard + FireAirQualityIntelPanel with PM2.5/PACT Act advisory
- New "Fire & Air Quality" sidebar lens with Flame icon
- Fire detection cross-visible in Monitoring and Military Installations lenses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

⚠️♻️ Replace maxConcurrency with fairnessWeight

Schema migration drops max_concurrency, adds fairness_weight.
Seed data: all campaigns start as draft with weights 10/5/5.
Config: GLOBAL_MAX_CONCURRENCY=20, MAX_CONCURRENT_ACTIVITIES=10.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add URI template matching to extract variable values from URIs

Implement Template.Match that reverses template expansion: given a parsed
URI template and a URI string, extracts the variable values that would
produce that URI when expanded. Supports all RFC 6570 operators with
percent-decoding, explode modifiers for lists and keys, and named
parameter parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Accept file paths in cli exec command

The exec subcommand now detects .ts/.js file paths and reads their
contents instead of treating them as literal code strings.

commit.message:
Initial commit: CNN Feature Visualization

A web application that visualizes how CNNs extract features from images.
Features:
- Handwritten digit input (MNIST style)
- Feature map visualization for each layer
- Filter weight visualization
- Convolution animation
- Real-time digit recognition (~91% accuracy)

Tech stack: HTML/CSS/JavaScript, TensorFlow.js, Canvas 2D

variable-font woff2 from Google Fonts v34/v35 (latin subset).

fix(catalogue): inject upload token into systemd service on deploy

The deploy script was only injecting CATALOGUE_UPLOAD_TOKEN into
admin.html (client-side) but not into the systemd service file,
causing a token mismatch and 401 on image uploads.

Fix CI release permissions

Add contents: write permission so GITHUB_TOKEN can create releases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: partner week sidebar shows correct points, compact total display (#199)

Partner week sidebar was using snapshot-based delta (totalPoints now minus
totalPoints at game start) which missed activity logged between the game's
startsAt date and when the start mutation actually ran. Now uses the same
loggedDate-based getPointsInPeriod() calculation as end-game scoring.

Also adds formatPointsCompact() for the sidebar status card so large totals
display as e.g. "70.6k" instead of "70627.47".

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
